items.title: Trump rips Canada as wildfire smoke spreads, says U.S. will add pollution cost to tariffs
items.summary: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the World Cup final in New Jersey.

items.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
items.summary: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.
items.label: earnings

items.summary: If the S&P 500 is to make a new record, it may require the "Magnificent Seven" to get back into gear.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Anthropic in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power
items.summary: The talks come weeks after Anthropic announced a similar deal with Elon Musk's SpaceX to use the computing capacity at its Colossus 1 data center
items.label: mna

items.title: Epstein victims blast Trump attorney general nominee Todd Blanche after meeting
items.summary: "Todd Blanche treated the meeting as a mere 'check-the-box' exercise intended to secure votes for his confirmation," said Epstein survivor Dani Bensky.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Oil tankers face 'worst case scenario' in Hormuz as Iran steps up attacks on ships, maritime risk CEO says
items.summary: One seafarer was killed and three were injured in attack on the crude oil tanker Al Bahyah off Oman's coast on Tuesday.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
items.summary: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.
items.label: guidance

items.title: Retail and Wall Street are underwater on SpaceX — but not going down without a fight
items.summary: Good times for SpaceX are proving short-lived as Elon Musk’s intergalactic IPO is now giving fodder to bears.

items.title: Fighter jet maker Saab smashes expectations as CEO urges procurement rethink
items.summary: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

items.title: I racked up $35,000 in credit-card debt. Should I file for bankruptcy?
items.summary: “I’m also considering working with a credit-counseling agency or enrolling in a hardship program.”
items.label: product

items.title: Trump doubles down on 2020 election claims in national address, alleging China meddling
items.summary: Trump also repeated his calls for the Republican-led Congress to pass the "SAVE America Act," a controversial election bill that lacks support to pass.

items.title: Taco Bell says it has removed lettuce linked to cyclosporiasis outbreak from its restaurants
items.summary: Taco Bell, which the CDC linked to the cyclosporiasis outbreak, will likely recover soon from the health safety scare, according to analysts.
